flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Thomas More University fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (51.3% → 40.5%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Thomas More University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (34.8% → 29.8%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Thomas More University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.8k → $39.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Thomas More University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.8k → $39.8k).
